zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Adam II de Kenyon於1273年出生時，他的父親Adam de Kenyon I41歲，母親Godith de Lauton22歲。他於1297年與Margaret Maud Hesketh在英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Adam II de Kenyon于1273年出生时，他的父亲Adam de Kenyon I41岁，母亲Godith de Lauton22岁。他于1297年与Margaret Maud Hesketh在英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kenyon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Kinion
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinyon  .

variants.name: Kinyon
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinion  .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Adam II de Kenyon was born in 1273, his father, Adam de Kenyon I, was 41 and his mother, Godith de Lauton, was 22. He married Margaret Maud Hesketh in 1297, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1346, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Adam II de Kenyon est né en 1273, son père, Adam de Kenyon I, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Godith de Lauton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Maud Hesketh en 1297, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1346, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Adam II de Kenyon 1273 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Kenyon I 41 und seine Mutter Godith de Lauton 22. Er hat 1297 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Maud Hesketh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Adam II de Kenyon è nato il nel 1273, il suo padre, Adam de Kenyon I, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Godith de Lauton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Maud Hesketh nel 1297, nel Kenyon, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1346, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Adam II de Kenyonが1273年に生まれた時，父Adam de Kenyon Iは41歳，母Godith de Lautonは22歳であった。1297年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンでMargaret Maud Heskethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Adam II de Kenyon(이)가 1273년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Kenyon I(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Godith de Lauton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄욘에서 Margaret Maud Hesketh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Adam II de Kenyon nasceu em 1273, seu pai, Adam de Kenyon I, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Godith de Lauton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Maud Hesketh em 1297, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1346, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Adam II de Kenyon родился в 1273 г., его отцу по имени Adam de Kenyon I было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Godith de Lauton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Maud Hesketh в 1297 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1346 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Adam II de Kenyon nació en 1273, su papá, Adam de Kenyon I, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Godith de Lauton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Maud Hesketh en 1297, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1346, a la edad de 73 años.
